message:
fix: clippy collapsible_if + constraint tests + LayoutConstraint import

- Fix collapsible_if clippy lint in diagram_layout.rs sifting refinement
- Add LayoutConstraint import to mermaid_layout.rs for constraint functions
- Add constraints field to test MermaidDiagramIr constructors
- Add constraint application tests (same_rank, min_length, pin, order)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
